meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master User Onboarding to Finish Your First AI App
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn to build high-converting user onboarding with Antigravity and Claude Code. Perfect for students building their first SaaS.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' cycle ends by prioritizing user onboarding. By building a frictionless path to the 'Aha!' moment, you anchor your project's value, maintain development momentum, and transform a messy prototype into a polished, portfolio-ready application that demonstrates real-world engineering proficiency to future employers.
content.intro:
You’ve been here: a half-finished repository, a mounting list of 'to-do' features, and the creeping anxiety that your project will never see the light of day. The graveyard of abandoned apps is filled with developers who focused on backend complexity while ignoring the user's journey. You aren't failing because you lack skill; you're failing because you lack a clear destination for your user.

User onboarding is the lighthouse in your storm. It forces you to define the core value proposition of your app, turning abstract features into a concrete, sequential experience. By mastering this, you stop building for yourself and start building for an audience, providing the focus required to finally ship your first production-ready application.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact point where a user gains value. We will use Antigravity to map the shortest path from sign-up to this outcome.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my app's core feature and map a 3-step user onboarding flow that leads the user to their first successful output with zero friction.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a user journey map for the authentication and first-run experience based on the core value proposition.'

steps.title: Implement Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Guide users through the interface without overwhelming them. Focus on progressive disclosure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React component for a contextual tooltip that highlights the primary action button only after the initial data load is complete.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Implement a tooltip library and wrap the primary call-to-action in an onboarding-aware state.'

steps.title: Build a Progress Tracker
steps.description: Gamify the onboarding process to reduce churn and give users a sense of completion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable progress bar component that tracks onboarding steps and persists state in localStorage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add a persistent progress bar component to the onboarding layout that updates based on completed tasks.'

steps.title: Automate Data Seeding
steps.description: An empty app is a boring app. Seed your onboarding with mock data so the user sees value immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script to seed a 'Getting Started' project and sample data for new users upon their first login.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a migration or seed script that populates a default workspace for new user accounts.'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Use Claude Code to wrap your onboarding flow in telemetry so you can see where users drop off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Suggest a simple analytics implementation to track when users complete the final step of the onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Integrate basic event tracking for the onboarding completion event and log it to the console.'

pro_tips: Never force a login before the user experiences the core value; let them 'peek' at the app first.
Use 'Empty States' to turn boring blank screens into educational opportunities with CTA buttons.
Keep your onboarding flow under 60 seconds; if it takes longer, you are over-explaining.
Use local storage to remember where the user left off so they can resume onboarding after a refresh.
A/B test your first onboarding step; changing one button color can increase completion rates by 20%.
content.next_steps: Now that your onboarding is live, deploy your project to a staging environment and record a 30-second walkthrough video to include in your portfolio.
content.conversion_block: You are closer than ever to shipping a product that users actually love. Stop the cycle of unfinished code and start building with intent. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
